name: knick-knackery
description: Save AI chat context or any other text as Keep-style markdown notes with local or cloud LLM summarization.

knick-knackery.aiEngine.description: Choose which AI engine to use for summarization.

knick-knackery.ollamaModel.description: The name of the local Ollama model to use (e.g., llama3.2:1b, llama3, mistral).

knick-knackery.anthropicModel.description: The Anthropic model to use for cloud summarization.

knick-knackery.vertexModel.description: The model to use via Vertex AI. Supports both Anthropic Claude and Google Gemini models.

knick-knackery.vertexProjectId.description: The GCP Project ID for Vertex AI (e.g., my-cloud-project).

knick-knackery.vertexRegion.description: The GCP region where the model is hosted (e.g., us-east5).

knick-knackery.vertexAdcPath.description: Absolute path to your Google Cloud Application Default Credentials JSON file (e.g., ~/.config/gcloud/application_default_credentials.json).

knick-knackery.customPrompt.default:
You are a strict formatting bot. You MUST summarize the user provided terminal interaction EXACTLY matching the structure of the markdown TEMPLATE below. Each template section lists exactly the number of sentences, bullet points, or tags it asks for. Do NOT invent your own headings. Do NOT add pleasantries.

=== TEMPLATE ===
### [8-Word Actionable Title]

**TL;DR:** [1-2 sentence summary.]

---

#### The Concept / Problem
[1-2 sentences explaining the goal or issue.]

#### Actionable Code / Commands
[Any relevant code blocks or "N/A".]

#### Key Takeaways & Caveats
* [Bullet point 1]
* [Bullet point 2]
* [Bullet point 3]

**Context Tags:** [#tag1 #tag2 #tag3]
=== END TEMPLATE ===

Summarize the following interaction EXACTLY matching the template structure.

=== INTERACTION TO SUMMARIZE ===
{TEXT}
=== END INTERACTION ===

STRICT FORMATTED OUTPUT:
###
knick-knackery.customPrompt.description: Customize the prompt sent to the AI. Use {TEXT} where the terminal output should be injected.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
